notes: DOCSIS-based cable broadband; still widely deployed as HFC/DOCSIS 3.1
Copper-pair DSL/ADSL from telcos; largely superseded by fiber in many markets
Combo router/modem/switch enabling multiple home devices to share single broadband connection
802.11b/g WiFi and Ethernet for in-home LAN; WiFi now ubiquitous
Voice over IP service delivered over broadband; now dominant form of consumer voice
Convergence of video over broadband; study predicted this battle; now dominant media consumption model
